## Pre-merge checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Manually previewed the changed page(s) and they look right
- [ ] Lighthouse score not regressed (if this touches layout, assets, or fonts)
- [ ] No PII / private info in committed content
- [ ] If résumé or About changed, the live PDF and date are still in sync
